name: xinleineng
tagline: High-Performance Power Module Solutions for Industrial and New Energy Applications
description: Xinleineng is a leading manufacturer of power modules including IGBT modules, SiC modules, and intelligent power modules (IPM), delivering high-efficiency power conversion solutions for industrial drives, new energy vehicles, solar inverters, and UPS systems.
longDescription: Xinleineng (芯联能) specializes in the design and manufacture of advanced power semiconductor modules. With comprehensive product lines covering IGBT modules, SiC MOSFET modules, and intelligent power modules (IPM), Xinleineng serves diverse applications including industrial motor drives, new energy vehicle powertrains, solar and wind energy systems, and uninterruptible power supplies. The company is committed to delivering high-reliability, high-efficiency power solutions with excellent thermal performance and competitive cost. Xinleineng products are widely used in China and exported globally, with certifications including ISO9001, IATF16949, and various industry standards.

coreProducts.name: IGBT Modules

coreProducts.name: SiC Modules

coreProducts.name: Rectifier Modules

seoTitle: Xinleineng Power Modules | IGBT SiC IPM Distributor | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Xinleineng IGBT modules, SiC power modules, and intelligent power modules. Technical support, selection guidance, and competitive pricing for industrial and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of Xinleineng products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is a core authorized distributor of Xinleineng power modules. We maintain direct partnership with Xinleineng and offer their complete product portfolio including IGBT modules, SiC modules, intelligent power modules (IPM), and rectifier modules. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine products with full factory warranty, technical support from certified FAEs, and competitive pricing for volume orders.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify current stock availability and request official authorization documentation for your procurement process.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Xinleineng power modules?
faqs.answer: Xinleineng power modules offer several competitive advantages: High cost-performance ratio compared to international brands while maintaining quality standards; Comprehensive product portfolio covering IGBT, SiC, and IPM solutions; Excellent thermal design with low thermal resistance; Robust packaging for harsh industrial environments; Local technical support and fast delivery from China; IATF16949 certification for automotive applications; Custom module development capability for specific requirements. These advantages make Xinleineng an attractive choice for cost-sensitive applications without compromising reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request samples for evaluation in your specific application to validate performance and reliability before volume procurement.

faqs.question: How do Xinleineng IGBT modules compare to international brands?
faqs.answer: Xinleineng IGBT modules offer comparable electrical performance to international brands like Infineon and Fuji Electric, with some key differences: Voltage and current ratings match industry standards (600V-1700V, 10A-600A); Switching characteristics are optimized for Chinese market applications; Thermal performance is competitive with Rth values similar to established brands; Packaging follows industry standards (EconoDUAL, 34mm, 62mm) for compatibility; Price advantage typically 20-40% lower than equivalent international brands; Lead times are shorter for standard products. For most industrial applications, Xinleineng provides reliable performance at significantly lower cost.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive industrial applications, Xinleineng offers excellent value. For mission-critical aerospace or medical applications, evaluate based on specific certification requirements.

faqs.question: What applications are best suited for Xinleineng SiC modules?
faqs.answer: Xinleineng SiC modules are ideal for applications requiring high efficiency and high-frequency operation: Solar inverters - higher switching frequency reduces passive component size; EV motor drives - lower switching losses improve vehicle range; High-frequency welding equipment - faster switching enables precise control; Data center power supplies - high efficiency reduces cooling requirements; Railway traction systems - wide bandgap properties suit high-voltage applications. SiC modules offer 30-50% lower switching losses compared to silicon IGBTs, enabling higher efficiency and power density. The higher cost of SiC is justified in applications where efficiency and size are critical.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications with switching frequencies above 20kHz or where efficiency above 98% is required, SiC modules are recommended over traditional IGBTs.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Xinleineng products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Xinleineng power modules: Product selection assistance based on your application requirements; Schematic and PCB layout review for optimal thermal and electrical performance; Gate driver design recommendations for reliable switching; Thermal modeling and heatsink selection guidance; Application notes and reference designs; On-site support for critical design reviews; Failure analysis support if issues arise; Custom module development coordination with Xinleineng factory. Our FAE team has extensive experience with power module applications across industrial, automotive, and renewable energy sectors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Engage our FAE team early in your design cycle to ensure optimal power module selection and implementation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time and MOQ for Xinleineng products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Xinleineng products vary by product type: Standard IGBT modules: 4-6 weeks from factory; Popular SiC modules: 6-8 weeks due to high demand; Custom or special modules: 8-12 weeks; Stock items at BeiLuo: 1-3 days for sample quantities. Minimum order quantities (MOQ) are: Standard modules: 100-500 pieces depending on type; Sample orders: 10-50 pieces accepted for evaluation; Volume pricing: Available for orders above 1000 pieces. BeiLuo maintains stock of popular models for fast delivery of sample and small quantity orders.
faqs.decisionGuide: For prototype development, request samples from our stock. For production orders, plan 6-8 week lead time and consider volume pricing for cost optimization.

faqs.question: How can I ensure proper thermal design with Xinleineng power modules?
faqs.answer: Proper thermal design is critical for reliable operation of power modules: Calculate power dissipation based on switching and conduction losses; Select heatsink with adequate thermal capacity based on ambient temperature; Use thermal interface material (TIM) with proper thickness and thermal conductivity; Ensure even pressure distribution across module baseplate; Follow recommended torque specifications for mounting; Consider airflow direction and velocity for forced cooling; Implement temperature monitoring with appropriate protection thresholds. Xinleineng provides thermal resistance specifications (RthJC, RthCS) and application notes for thermal design. BeiLuo FAEs can assist with thermal modeling and heatsink selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for thermal design review and heatsink recommendations specific to your application conditions.
